title: Ретро Классика
prompt: Vintage 35mm film photography style. Show the person from the photo in a nostalgic retro setting. Warm film grain, soft colors, analog look. CRUCIAL: Preserve facial features exactly. Photorealistic film scan.

title: Полароид
prompt: Polaroid instant photo style. Show the person from the photo with white polaroid frame, slight fade, authentic instant film look. CRUCIAL: Preserve facial identity. Photorealistic.

title: Лунный НГ (Аозай)
